title: Added Studio Route Registry Shell Contract
summary: Moved Local Studio route shell metadata into the checked-in app.routes registry, derived runtime views from that registry, added registry validation, and added a browser-side route-registry helper for the first JavaScript app shell migration slice.
effect: Studio route labels, paths, scripts, doc IDs, shell types, and ready-state IDs now have a single config-owned contract that Python validates and browser helpers can consume before any route shell is migrated.
